title: Sound Healing, Frequencies & Vibrations with Ami M Doshi
description: A calming, eye-opening conversation on how sound, frequency, and vibration can support nervous-system regulation and inner balance—with practical takeaways you can try in everyday life.

title: Women’s Equality: The Truth Almost No One Wants to Admit (with Omkareshwar Das)
description: An unfiltered dialogue on equality, expectations, and the uncomfortable truths we avoid in public discourse—and what it takes to move from argument to understanding.

title: Stop Studying Hard, Start Studying Smart — Academic Truths for Parents (with Samarth Academy)
description: Reframes how we push young people to “grind,” with smarter study habits, mindset shifts, and what parents can do to support confidence without burning their kids out.

title: Menopause: Problem or Natural Transition? Ayurveda & Women’s Wellness (with Dr. Nidhi Navani)
description: A warm, myth-busting episode on menopause as a life phase—Ayurvedic perspective, body literacy, and how to advocate for your health with clarity and care.
